texto: More than anything else, my mother wanted to be an actress - a famous actress - which in the 1950s was all about being young, sexy, and available. She was all that, and more. She had big blue eyes, alabaster skin, a heart-shaped face, a beautiful figure. She was just a knockout.
explicacao: Citação de Meredith Baxter sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “More than anything else, my mother wanted to be an actress - a famous actress - which in the 1950…” articula amor, beautiful, mother em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como mother e eyes.
